communications.subject: Virginia Freedom of Information Act Request: VHDA Website LIHTC Application PDFs
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All 4% LIHTC and 9% LIHTC application PDFs submitted in 2018. These were once listed on the applications archive page of the superseded vhda.com website. The LIHTC applications archive page on virginiahousing.com no longer hosts them.

For reference, the list of projects for which applications were posted under the year 2018 included the following:

[4% applications]
1. Aero Apartment Homes Phase II aka Town Center Apts
2. Alexander at 1090
3. Ashburn Chase II
4. Church Hill North Phase 1B
5. Colonial Village West
6. Culpepper Garden I
7. Greene Hills Estates
8. Heritage Acres
9. Hope Village
10. Ivy Farms
11. Market Square V
12. Massanutten Manor
13. Murraygate Village Apartments
14. New Manchester Flats V-4
15. Newport Harbour
16. Orchard Ridge at Jackson Village II
17. Parkwood Apartments
18. Petersburg Artist Space
19. Queens Court North
20. Renaissance II
21. Riverbend Apartments Phase III
22. Robert Regan Village
23. Royal Arms
24. SPA Lofts
25. St. Luke Apartments
26. Sunset Hampton
27. The Belt Atlantic
28. The Berkeley II
29. The Carlin
30. The Residences at North Hill 47
31. The Residences at North Hill Bond 94
32. The Retreat at Harbor Pointe
33. Whittaker Place
34. Willow View Townhomes

[9% applications]
1. Alexander at 1090 Apartments
2. Apartments at Kingsridge 2
3. Ashburn Chase
4. Ballston Station Apartments
5. Bickerstaff Crossing
6. Burton Creek
7. Carlton Views II
8. Church Hill North 2A
9. Deerfield Apartments
10. Diggs II
11. East Gate Village
12. Grande Oak
13. Hanover Apartments
14. Hawks Landing
15. Holley Pointe
16. Huntington Village
17. Jackson Greene
18. King William Manor
19. Lambert Landing
20. Lexington Place Phase I
21. Market Square IV
22. Marvin Gardens
23. Maury River Place
24. Mountain Laurel Manor II
25. New Clay House II
26. New Manchester Flats V
27. New River Gardens I
28. Parkside at Dumfries
29. Pine Forest
30. Pinecrest Apartments
31. Piper Square Apartments
32. Queens Court South
33. Renaissance Apartments
34. Riverbend Apartments Phase II
35. Senior Townsquare at Dumfries
36. Skyline Manor Apartments
37. SR Residences at North Hill
38. Sycamore Towers Apartments
39. The Arden - Building A
40. The Estates at Bank Street
41. The Residences at North Hill 2
42. The Spire
43. Town Center Apartments
44. Townhomes at Warwick Place II
45. Venable Street Development
46. Washington Square
47. Woodlawn School Apartments

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tom Nash, a citizen of Virginia, in coordination with Lars Brown.
